headline: The app receives mixed reviews on its features and user experience, but is largely criticized for its poor customer support and unclear withdrawal fees and processes.

top_themes.label: Product Experience and Features
top_themes.description: Users have mixed opinions about the app's features and user experience.

top_themes.label: Customer Support
top_themes.description: Users are generally dissatisfied with the customer support provided by the app.

top_themes.label: Withdrawals
top_themes.description: Users have mixed opinions about the withdrawal process and fees associated with it.

actions: Improve response times and provide clear updates on issue resolution
Enhance transparency of fees and charges associated with withdrawals
Streamline the user interface and provide better guidance and solutions
